entry.title: lissy93 commented on pull request lissy93/awesome-privacy#652
entry.content:
lissy93 commented on lissy93/awesome-privacy#652 · July 13, 2026 19:56
lissy93 commented Jul 13, 2026
It is neater, and will stay up-to-date if you update the icon. But if you move/delete the icon, then awesome privacy will show a broken image.
